identification.title: GROW-Africa: An Africa-wide agricultural production database

consent.consent_scope: Assimilated from multiple sources: government statistics, household surveys, plot-level measurements; each source has own consent/terms; consolidated dataset for policy and satellite-based measurement.

permitted_use.use_restrictions: See Nature Scientific Data paper and data availability statement. Research and policy use; model training for remote sensing/yield mapping as described in paper.

provenance.collector_org: Multiple (see Jain et al. Nature Sci Data 2025); assimilated and curated by GROW-Africa team

audit.notes: Governance record filled for DSA 2026 workshop application. Multi-source assimilated database; 535,844 georeferenced crop yield observations; 25 crops.
